name: IRC_CAMP_MSTEAMS_BOT_CHNL_MAP
description: Table to store the mapping of bot-appi-id, team, channels and service URL.which will be use in BOT Connector api's to send the message

columns.Name: CAMP_MSTEAMS_BOT_CHNL_MAP_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: TEAM_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the internal ID of the team within the Microsoft Teams app.

columns.Name: TEAM_NAME
columns.Comments: Stores the Name of the team within the Microsoft Teams app.

columns.Name: TEAM_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the team status like activate, delete, archive.

columns.Name: CHANNEL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the internal ID of the channel within the Microsoft Teams app.

columns.Name: SERVICE_URL
columns.Comments: Stores the Microsoft teams channels service url.

columns.Name: TENANT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores customer tenant guid of Microsoft azure.

columns.Name: BOT_APP_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Microsoft Bot’s Azure app registration ID (client ID).

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
